category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages Apple Container with Docker Compose files; official GitHub README describes it as a docker-compose-like tool for Apple Container.

docs_sources: Official repository README is the available documentation surface, with getting started, installation, and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Mcrich23/container-compose, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
